---
title: 'The Word is Alive, Listen to Him'
date: '2020-06-22T14:13:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: false
categories:
  - 'Musings'
---

<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
  <a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1592835211645913-0-6a010f7aa0b3.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;">
    <img border="0"   src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1592835211645913-0-6a010f7aa0b3.png" width="400">
  </a>
</div><div><br></div><div>The Word is Jesus</div><div><br></div><div>The Word is not dry writings of yesteryear, to be followed by rote, our New Law, bound as slaves... Blindly following a prescription for life.</div><div><br></div><div>The Word is a person. A member of the Godhead. A living being.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>The Word is our bread.</div><div><br></div><div>The Word is our life.</div><div><br></div><div>If we have lack, it's because we ask not, or, if we ask, we ask with wrong selfish motives. The Word said that.</div><div><br></div><div>He wants us to ask, seek, knock, and then hear, listen, obey.</div><div><br></div><div>Sometimes His healing comes in the form of putting mud on your eyes and telling you to go wash it off. Sometimes His healing is from going to wash in a dirty river. Sometimes His healing is spoken, and you leave by faith to do as He said without any sign it is "working"...</div><div><br></div><div>He is interested in our submission, not our blind obedience to a written code.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>Today..... Spend time LISTENING not just reading.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>By all means, read your Bible. But more importantly, or at least as important, LISTEN. Hear what he would say to you today.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>Selah.</div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div>
